case_title: JESS R. WILLIAMS VS. JOHNSTON TAX GROUP, INC.

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON AMENDED CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED OCT-29-2014, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT JOHNSTON, JEFFREY K.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,500.00 FILED BY WILLIAMS, JESS R. AS TO DEFENDANT JOHNSTON TAX GROUP, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-20-2014 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$35.00) SERVED SEP-02-2014, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT JOHNSTON TAX GROUP, INC.
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FILED BY PLAINTIFF WILLIAMS, JESS R. AS TO DEFENDANT JOHNSTON TAX GROUP, INC.
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE CLAIM HEARING OF DEC-08-2014 OFF CALENDAR, DISMISSAL FILED
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT JOHNSTON TAX GROUP, INC.
DECLARATION FOR AMENDING THE CLAIM TO ADD DEFENDANT JEFFREY K. JOHNSTON AND TO DISMISS CURRENT DEFENDANT JOHNSTON TAX GROUP, INC. FILED BY PLAINTIFF WILLIAMS, JESS R.
REMARK: FILE IS DESTROYED PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 68153. ORDER SIGNED AND FILED ON 10/14/2025.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-20-2014 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE ON THE AMENDED CLAIM TO DEC-08-2014 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. "DEFENDANT CLAIMS THE CORPORATION DID NOT EXIST AT THE TIME OF THE TRANSACTION WITH PLAINTIFF WHO INTENDS TO AMEND HIS COMPLAINT TO ADD THE PROPER PARTY", PER JUDGE MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF TO SERVED THE AMENDED CLAIM ON THE DEFENDANT PRIOR TO THE NEXT HEARING DATE. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS REPRESENTED BY JEFF JOHNSTON--PRESIDENT & SHAREHOLDER AND ALEX CANUT--OFFICE MANAGER. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
AMENDED MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,500.00 FILED BY WILLIAMS, JESS R. AS TO DEFENDANT JOHNSTON, JEFFREY K.
